description_long: This street light features a tall, cylindrical pole with a robust, rounded base for stability. The upper section of the pole is adorned with ornate scrollwork and supports a single, outward-extending horizontal arm. At the end of this arm hangs a classic, bell-shaped lamp head with a decorative finial on top, evoking a vintage or early 20th-century design. The lamp head is covered by a wide, flared metal shade that directs light downward, and the scrollwork adds an elegant touch to the overall structure. The pole itself is subtly ribbed, enhancing its visual appeal and giving it a sense of historical character. This type of street light is commonly found in urban parks, historic districts, or along pedestrian walkways.
description: A tall, ornate street light with a ribbed pole, decorative scrollwork, and a classic bell-shaped lamp head suspended from a horizontal arm.
description_view_0: The street light is seen from the front, showing the central pole and the lamp head directly above, with the decorative finial visible.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the ornate scrollwork and the horizontal arm extending outward, supporting the bell-shaped lamp head.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the pole and lamp head, with the scrollwork partially visible and the finial on top.
description_view_3: Another side view, mirroring view 1, highlights the arm, scrollwork, and the downward-facing lamp head.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Classic bell-shaped design with a wide, flared metal shade and a decorative finial on top; the lamp head is covered and directs light downward.
attribute_pole_ornamentation: Ribbed pole with ornate scrollwork at the arm junction and a decorative finial at the top.
